auth.banned.help: Think this is a mistake? Open an appeal in our Discord — the team will review it.

auth.confirm.resendError: Couldn't resend the email. Try again in a few minutes.

engine.upgradeUnlock: Upgrade to premium to unlock ELO up to 3500 and full engine tuning
engine.search.title: Search depth
engine.force.title: Force search depth
engine.force.descPremium: Bypass engine self-limiting; unlocks up to 3500 ELO.
engine.force.descFree: Premium — bypass engine self-limiting and tune search budget.
engine.personality.upgrade: Upgrade to premium to unlock more personalities
engine.kingSafety.default: Engine uses its default king safety
engine.variety.strongest: Engine always plays the strongest move
engine.variety.higher: Higher values make moves less predictable
engine.maia.warningTitle: Heads up — opening play is unreliable
engine.maia.warningBody: Maia 2 was trained with the first 5 moves of each side discarded (10 plies, to skip memorised theory), so its early-opening suggestions can be unusual — knight wanderings in particular.
engine.maia.fixBookDesc: Used for the first 5 moves / 10 plies.
engine.maia.strengthNote: Strength comes from the ELO setting — Maia plays in one forward pass, no depth tuning.
engine.rodent.imprecisionDesc: Adds random noise to evaluation — occasional mistakes.
engine.rodent.personalityDesc: 39 personalities — each GM plays their authentic opening repertoire.
auto.offHint: Select a mode to configure assist.
auto.hotkey.title: Hotkey
auto.hotkey.notSupported: Premoves are not supported on {{platform}} — only Chess.com is enabled for now.
auto.onScreenButtons.desc: Show floating buttons on the page. Click to play the move, long-press to play + queue a premove.
auto.onScreenButtons.descNoPremove: Show floating buttons on the page. Click to play the move.
auto.upgrade.hotkey: Upgrade to premium to unlock full hotkey tuning
auto.premoveCard.title: Premove
auto.premoveCard.notSupported: Not supported on {{platform}} — premove is only available on Chess.com.
auto.autoPlay.title: Auto Play
auto.autoPlay.botNotAvailable: This is not available on bot games
auto.upgrade.auto: Upgrade to premium to unlock full auto-play tuning
auto.moveSelection.title: Move selection
auto.moveSelection.desc: How often the engine picks move #1 vs alternatives
auto.moveSelection.prioritizeDesc: Always play a forcing move when available; sample between moves if multiple.
auto.humanize.title: Humanize
settings.general.disableInfoBanner.hint: Hides proactive nudges from chessr (tips, claim free trial, join Discord). Admin announcements still come through.
settings.general.openStream.hint: Opens a dedicated Chessr page (chessboard + live suggestions) in a new tab — capture it with OBS to overlay your stream.
settings.general.resetConfirm: Reset all settings to defaults? This will clear custom layouts, hotkeys, engine preferences, etc.
settings.general.copyDebug.hint: Copies a diagnostic dump (extension version, WS state, recent errors + WS messages, background script logs) to clipboard. Paste it in a support ticket or Discord.
game.lastMoves.title: Last Moves
settings.engine.autoEloBoost.desc: Added to opponent's ELO when Auto ELO is enabled.
engine.info.komodo.desc: Classical engine with deep search and full tuning.
engine.info.maia3.desc: New Maia model with continuous ELO and wider range.
engine.info.rodent.desc: 39 named personalities (GM-style + style archetypes) with a tunable imprecision dial.
engine.info.stockfish.desc: Open-source classical engine — fast, pure tactical strength, no personality tuning.
settings.engine.server.title: Server suggestions
settings.engine.server.desc: Run suggestion searches on our servers instead of your device — zero CPU usage locally.
settings.engine.server.thresholdDesc: If server load goes above this, suggestions automatically run on your device instead — so you never wait in a queue. Back to the server once load calms down.
auto.unlock.title: Hotkeys & Auto-move — a Premium feature
auto.unlock.body: Play the best move with a single keypress, queue instant premoves, or let Auto mode play entire games with human-like timing. Never lose on time again.
engine.premiumCard: Full strength & engine tuning — a Premium feature
trial.expiry.title: Your free trial ends in

trial.expiry.endedBody: Keep your Premium features — pick a plan and don't lose a thing.
